_comment: Taiyo Yuden M-series part-number grammar. Format inferred from verified-real parts (JMK105CBJ106MV-F, LMK105BJ105KV-F, JMK107ABJ106KA-T). Voltage is encoded in the 3-char prefix; size is the next 3 digits; an optional termination char may follow; then a 2-char TCC code, 3-char cap, 1-char tolerance, 1-char thickness, and a -X packaging suffix. The optional termination char is the source of ambiguity — present in newer parts, absent in older ones.
